description_long: This is a compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short, matte-black metal barrel and a wooden grip. The barrels are thick and run parallel, with no visible ribbing or venting between them. The wooden grip and fore-end are finished in a natural brown color, accented with blue tape or paint at both ends, giving it a rugged, makeshift appearance. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses two triggers, suggesting the ability to fire each barrel independently. The overall design is minimalistic, lacking a full stock and instead featuring a pistol grip for easier handling in close quarters. This type of shotgun is often associated with urban environments due to its compact size and ease of concealment.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short black barrel and a wooden pistol grip, accented by blue tape. The design is minimalistic and rugged, suitable for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the parallel double barrels, wooden grip, and blue tape accents.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open muzzles of the two barrels, emphasizing the side-by-side configuration and the thickness of the barrels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the trigger guard, double triggers, and the wooden grip's curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden grip and blue tape, with the barrels extending away and the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard enclosing two triggers, no finger grooves or reinforcement
